title: Recent Advances and New Directions in Superconductor Electronic Design Automation Tools
abstract: The successful completion of the IARPA SuperTools project, which significantly advanced the state-of-the-art in superconductor electronic design automation (EDA) tools, enabled superconductor electronics (SCE) designers to synthesize and verify complex circuits such as 64-bit RISC processors. Advances under SuperTools included technology computer-aided design (TCAD), logic and clock synthesis, place-and-route and compact model extraction directly from layouts. A recent DARPA project on homomorphic encryption with SCE circuits demanded improvements in high-level synthesis, place-and-route and timing extraction tools. New lumped-element transmission line models were introduced to simulation tools to handle not just reflections, but also cross-coupling, dispersion and loss on inter-gate transmission lines in very large digital systems. Despite the maturity of large-scale digital circuit design and analysis tools, recent developments in the field have exposed a need to add EDA capabilities for superconductor quantum computing (SQC) design, analysis and verification. SQC end-user demand for tools that model and process flux trapping, vortex displacement, noise, high-precision extraction of weak magnetic coupling, and microwave frequency analysis for resonance and impedance has driven new directions in tool development. In this presentation, we discuss EDA advances post-SuperTools, including the new research and development efforts demanded by SQC applications
title_zh: 超导电子设计自动化工具的最新进展与新方向
abstract_zh: IARPA SuperTools项目的成功完成显著提升了超导电子设计自动化（EDA）工具的尖端水平，使超导电子（SCE）设计人员能够综合并验证64位RISC处理器等复杂电路。SuperTools项目的进展包括工艺计算机辅助设计（TCAD）、逻辑与时钟综合、布局布线以及直接从版图提取紧凑模型。近期一项使用超导电子电路实现同态加密的DARPA项目，对高层次综合、布局布线和时序提取工具提出了改进需求。仿真工具引入了新的集总元件传输线模型，不仅能处理反射，还能应对超大规模数字系统中门间传输线的交叉耦合、色散和损耗。尽管大规模数字电路设计与分析工具已十分成熟，近期发展表明需要为超导量子计算（SQC）的设计、分析与验证增加EDA能力。SQC终端用户对工具的需求包括：对磁通捕获、涡旋位移和噪声的建模与处理，弱磁耦合的高精度提取，以及针对谐振与阻抗的微波频率分析，这些需求正驱动着工具开发的新方向。在本次报告中，我们将讨论SuperTools后的EDA进展，包括因SQC应用而产生的新研发工作。

title: Towards Effective Sampling of SMT Solutions
authors: Shuangyu Lyu, Chuan Luo, Ruizhi Shi, Wei Wu, Chanjuan Liu, Chunming Hu
abstract: This work focuses on effectively generating diverse solutions for satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) formulas, targeting the theories of bit-vectors, arrays, and uninterpreted functions, which is a critical task in software and hardware testing. Generating diverse SMT solutions helps uncover faults and detect safety violations during verification and testing. This gives rise to the SMT sampling problem, whose goal is to construct a diverse solution set that achieves comprehensive coverage of the constraint space. While high coverage is crucial for exploring system behaviors, the number of generated solutions should also be kept small in software engineering scenarios. Since each SMT solution typically corresponds to a test case or test input, generating fewer solutions for the same coverage directly reduces testing time and resource consumption, thereby improving testing efficiency. In this work, we introduce PanSampler, a novel SMT sampler that achieves high coverage with a small number of solutions. PanSampler incorporates a new diversity-aware SMT algorithm and a post-sampling optimization strategy, which together enhance its practical performance. It iteratively samples solutions, evaluates candidates, and employs local search to refine solutions, ensuring high coverage with a small number of samples. Extensive experiments on practical benchmarks demonstrate that PanSampler exhibits a significantly stronger capability to reach high target coverage, while requiring fewer solutions than state-of-the-art samplers to achieve the same coverage level. Furthermore, our empirical evaluation on practical subjects, which are collected from real-world software systems, shows that PanSampler achieves stronger fault detection capability. Moreover, when reaching the same fault detection effectiveness as the competitors, PanSampler greatly reduces the number of required solutions, thereby improving testing efficiency. Our evaluations also validate the effectiveness of PanSampler’s core components. PanSampler represents a significant advancement in SMT sampling for software engineering, contributing to the cost reduction of software testing and hardware verification.
abstract_zh: 本工作聚焦于为可满足性模理论（SMT）公式高效生成多样化解，针对位向量、数组及未解释函数理论，这在软件与硬件测试中是一项关键任务。生成多样化的SMT解有助于在验证与测试过程中发现故障并检测安全违规。由此引出SMT采样问题，其目标是构建一个多样化解集，以实现对约束空间的全面覆盖。虽然高覆盖对于探索系统行为至关重要，但在软件工程场景中，生成的解的数量也应保持较少。由于每个SMT解通常对应一个测试用例或测试输入，在同等覆盖下生成更少的解可直接减少测试时间与资源消耗，从而提升测试效率。本文中，我们提出PanSampler，一种新颖的SMT采样器，能够以少量解实现高覆盖。PanSampler融合了一种新的多样性感知SMT算法和一个采样后优化策略，共同增强了其实用性能。它通过迭代采样、评估候选解并采用局部搜索来精化解，确保以少量样本实现高覆盖。在实用基准上的大量实验表明，PanSampler在达到高目标覆盖方面表现出显著增强的能力，同时相比现有最先进采样器，达到相同覆盖水平所需的解更少。此外，我们在收集自真实软件系统的实际对象上的实证评估显示，PanSampler具备更强的故障检测能力。而且，在达到与竞争对手相同的故障检测效果时，PanSampler大幅减少了所需解的数量，从而提升了测试效率。我们的评估也验证了PanSampler核心组件的有效性。PanSampler代表了软件工程中SMT采样的一项重要进展，有助于降低软件测试与硬件验证的成本。
